# Basic Matrix Algebra {#matrix-algebra}

```{r matrix-algebra-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/matrix-algebra-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/matrix-algebra/"
)
```

```{r child-matrix-algebra, child="../lecture-content/12-matrix-algebra.Rmd"}
```
